_comment: One entry per PUBLISHABLE marketing page (all 10 audit/ pages are excluded by construction and never appear here). publish defaults to false for a STAGED, rolling-approval launch (CR-002 refinement #1). The initial launch set is the 11 pages with publish:true. Canonicals are self-referential, derived from config.canonical_host. Titles/descriptions here are the demo values; the build strips the ' — Demo Concept' suffix at emit time.
